extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters by direction and category: I counted only the “Against the Company” row for 1 criminal, 10 tax and 6 statutory/regulatory proceedings, plus the “Against the Subsidiaries” row for 1 tax proceeding; all “By” rows and promoter/director personal matters were excluded. The quantified aggregate amount against the company and subsidiaries is ₹197.98 million plus ₹1.07 million, or ₹199.05 million = ₹19.905 crore, excluding directors’ and promoter matters. The contingent-liabilities table is as of December 31, 2023 and has no stated Total row, so its disclosed components were summed: ₹27.27m + ₹34.52m + ₹72.27m + ₹832.26m = ₹966.32m = ₹96.632 crore; the supplier claim is shown as nil. The only company-wide concentration figure applicable to the requested fields is top 10 customers at 70.96% of revenue from operations for full Fiscal 2023; no company-wide top-five percentage is disclosed. Monetary tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
